Compliance.description: 6-month CPA warranty standard; POPIA policy on sites; no regulatory complaints or issues found; licensed dealer operating multiple branches.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.95/5 (650 reviews, 96.5% 5 stars recent 2026 praise for staff/service); AutoTrader branches 3.7-4.4/5 (35-44 reviews each) positive recent.

Product Value.description: Competitive pre-owned pricing, quality sourced vehicles, 6mo warranty good value vs private sale.

Innovation.description: Basic website showroom; no app/mobile tools/digital booking found; standard industry.

Customer Support.description: Excellent per reviews: fast, professional staff responses; admin/F&I praised; warranty support implied.

Accessibility & Security.description: Basic website access; POPIA compliance stated on sites; no advanced security/digital features noted. Standard for dealer.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Pre-owned from R150k (Suzuki) to R800k+ (SUVs/bakkies) 2024/2025 models ZAR

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter/Google/AutoTrader: highly positive (4.7+ avg weighted), recent 2026 reviews praise service; minimal complaints.
